name: Teresa S Mama Limo Svc
recent_news: No public news located; appears to be a micro single-operator livery/limo service at 1025 N Fairview St, Burbank, CA. No indication of school-bus contracting.
fit_notes: Not a fit. ~3 employees / ~$220K revenue micro limo operator with no evidence of school district contracts or yellow-bus fleet; too small and wrong service category for a Summit tuck-in.

name: Vogue Limousine Svc Inc
recent_news: Yelp lists the Pasadena Vogue Limousine location as CLOSED as of May 2026; related Vogue Limousines Worldwide operates out of LA/San Dimas serving executive/airport/wedding travel, not student transport.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Closed/sub-scale executive limo service with no school-bus or SPED operations; not a Summit acquisition candidate.

name: City-Yellow Checker Cab Co
recent_news: No specific news located. Phone (432) 682-1661 is a Midland, TX area code; appears to be a small local taxi/checker cab operator, not a school-bus contractor.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Local taxi/cab service with 3 employees; no yellow-bus fleet or district contracts. Wrong business model for Summit tuck-in.

name: Care E Me Wheelchair
districts_or_customers: Skagit Valley, WA region (non-emergency medical / elderly / disabled)
recent_news: Care-E-Me (Skagit County, WA) has grown from one van at 2010 founding to an 18-vehicle ADA-compliant NEMT/wheelchair fleet serving Skagit Valley and surrounding areas; no school district / SPED contract disclosed publicly.
fit_notes: Marginal fit at best. Real NEMT operator with ADA-equipped fleet (~18 vans) but oriented to medical/elderly transport, not K-12 student transportation. Could be peripheral SPED-adjacent tuck-in only if Summit wanted Pacific NW NEMT/wheelchair capacity; not a core school-bus target.

name: R CS Limousine Svc
recent_news: No public news located. Listed at 4070 Adelaide Ave, Klamath Falls, OR with 4 employees; appears to be a micro local limo operator. Klamath Falls City Schools and Klamath County SD run their own pupil transportation, with no indication of contracting RCS.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Micro limousine service with no school-bus fleet or visible district contracts; too small and wrong vertical for a Summit tuck-in.
